description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal is a tall, rectangular unit with a sturdy base and a vertical body, primarily white with red and green accents. The front features a prominent touchscreen display set within a red bezel, positioned at a comfortable height for standing users. Below the screen, there is a compartment with a door, which reveals an organized interior with slots for receipts or other materials and a transparent container. The top section displays a green sign with a shopping cart icon and French text, indicating its use for home delivery or payment services. The sides are mostly plain, with one side showing a card reader and the other side featuring a red stripe and logo. The overall design is modern, functional, and intended for public or semi-public urban environments.
description: A modern, white self-service payment kiosk with a touchscreen, card reader, and green instructional signage, designed for public use. Features a front compartment and red branding accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen, green signage, and open compartment with organized slots and a transparent container.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, protruding card reader, and the edge of the display screen.
description_view_2: Rear view with the compartment door open, revealing the internal slots and storage area; no display or interface visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red branding stripe and logo, as well as the side of the display screen.
attribute_display_screen: A single rectangular touchscreen display, approximately 30x20 cm, is mounted on the upper front of the kiosk with a red bezel and slightly recessed orientation for user interaction.
attribute_payment_interface: A card reader is visible on the right side of the kiosk, positioned below the display screen, suitable for chip or swipe card payments.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A red logo and stripe are printed vertically on the left side of the kiosk, with additional branding on the green signage at the top front.
attribute_instructional_signage: Green instructional signage with a shopping cart icon and French text is located at the top front of the kiosk, providing user guidance in a printed style.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A receipt dispenser slot is located below the touchscreen, integrated into the compartment area, accessible when the door is open.
